redis_py.signature: blmove(, first_list: str,, second_list: str,, timeout: int,, src: str = "LEFT",, dest: str = "RIGHT",)

jedis.signature: String blmove(final String srcKey, final String dstKey, final ListDirection from final ListDirection to, final double timeout)

params.name: to
params.description: can be LEFT or RIGHT

params.name: timeout
params.description: seconds to block. A timeout of zero can be used to block indefinitely.

returns.description: The element being popped and pushed

lettuce_sync.signature: V blmove(K source, K destination, LMoveArgs args, long timeout)

params.name: source
params.description: the source key.

params.name: destination
params.description: the destination type: key.

params.description: command arguments to configure source and destination directions.

params.description: the timeout in seconds.

nredisstack_sync.signature: BLMove(RedisKey source, RedisKey destination, ListSide sourceSide, ListSide destinationSide, double timeout)

params.name: source
params.description: The key of the source list.

params.name: destination
params.description: The key of the destination list.

params.name: sourceSide
params.description: What side of the source list to remove from.

params.name: destinationSide
params.description: What side of the destination list to move to.

params.name: timeout
params.description: Server-side timeout for the wait. A value of 0 means to wait indefinitely.

returns.description: The element being popped and pushed, or null if the server timeout expires.

nredisstack_sync.signature: ListMove(RedisKey sourceKey, RedisKey destinationKey, ListSide sourceSide, ListSide destinationSide, CommandFlags flags = CommandFlags.None)

params.name: sourceKey
params.description: The key of the list to remove from.

params.name: destinationKey
params.description: The key of the list to move to.

params.name: sourceSide
params.description: What side of the sourceKey list to remove from.

params.name: destinationSide
params.description: What side of the destinationKey list to move to.

params.name: flags
params.description: The flags to use for this operation.

returns.description: The element being popped and pushed or Null if there is no element to move.
